name: Outlook Calendar
description: Connect to Microsoft Outlook Calendar via the Microsoft Graph API to sync events, meetings, and calendar data into Shielva.

install_fields.label: Application (client) ID
install_fields.description: Azure AD application client ID from the Azure Portal app registration.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.description: Azure AD client secret value (not the secret ID).

install_fields.label: Azure AD Tenant (optional)
install_fields.description: Your Azure AD tenant ID or domain. Leave blank to allow any Microsoft account.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.description: OAuth redirect URI registered in Azure Portal. Must match exactly.
